assertions.description: The isolation_barriers detector correctly identified GND, GNDA, CAN-GND, and GNDS as four separate ground domains, and listed U3 (ADuM1201CR) as the isolation component. This is accurate: the design galvanically isolates the capacitive sensor measurement side (GNDS), the analog section (GNDA), the CAN bus side (CAN-GND), and the main digital section (GND).

INCORRECT: The bus_analysis.can entry identifies the CAN network with U6 as both transceiver and the sole device. However U7 (AT90CAN64-16AU) is the CAN controller MCU that drives TXCAN/RXCAN through U3 (ADuM1201CR digital isolator) to U6. U7 should appear in the devices list as the CAN controller. The net-level cross_domain_signals section does correctly show TXCAN and RXCAN connecting U3 and U7, but the bus_analysis.can aggregation does not include U7 as a participant.
